title: Asperella hystrix

The plant has been found to possess various health benefits, including antimicrobial and antifungal properties, which can aid in the treatment of infections and promote wound healing. Bioactive constituents of Asperella hystrix include terpenoids, phenolic compounds, and glycosides, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Asperella hystrix is often used to prepare teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of conditions, including fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues.
